title: Feel free to edit this template
bio:
Go to the endpoint [/generator](/generator) and start editing this template.

Most text fields support markdown syntax: be creative with **bold**, *italic* and [links](google.com).

- [/generator/profile](/generator/profile): For the current section with your profile picture, bio and links.
- [/generator/metadata](/generator/metadata): For the website title, colors and font, your logo and the google analytics tracker.
- [/generator/resume](/generator/resume): To list all your past academic or professional experiences.
- [/generator/article](/generator/article): To write blog post or present your latest research.
- [/generator/talk](/generator/talk): To list places where you said something interesting.

All of these have a **copy button** that will give you a json text that you need to paste in the associated file in the forked repo in **/src/content** folder. For the articles, you need to create a new file and paste the content there. You can also edit the content directly in the file if you are confortable with json format.
